message:
fix(command,persist): add iteration limits to while/repeat/for loops in Lua eval, fix persist indentation

lua_eval: add MAX_ITERATIONS guard to while, repeat, numeric-for, and
generic-for loop execution paths, preventing infinite loops from hanging
the server. New test: empty_while_loop_hits_iteration_limit.

persist: fix indentation in RDB/AOF serialization methods (formatting only).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
